result.stdout:
Usage: auto-tester [options]

Options:
  -d|--working-directory <WORKING_DIRECTORY>                                Working Directory / Folder to monitor
  -c|--args-to-dot-net-test <ARGS_TO_DOT_NET_TEST>                          Additional params to pass to `dotnet run` (eg -v q)
  -m|--maximum-number-of-tests-to-queue <MAXIMUM_NUMBER_OF_TESTS_TO_QUEUE>  Maximum number of tests to queue (default 50)
  -r|--use-roslyn                                                           Use Roslyn to find affected test if possible (BETA)
  -a|--run-all-tests                                                        Always run all tests when a change is detected
  -?|-h|--help                                                              Show help information
